title: Merck India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Merck India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Merck India Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Nagpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Merck India Ventures Solutions:
Merck India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Merck India Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
